name: 人像模板
description: 各种人像摄影提示词模板

templates.name: 写真风格
templates.prompt: professional portrait photography, {subject}, soft lighting, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, {background}, high detail, 8k quality
templates.negative: blurry, low quality, distorted features, oversaturated

templates.name: 证件照
templates.prompt: official ID photo, {subject}, plain white/blue background, frontal pose, natural expression, high contrast, sharp focus, passport style

templates.name: 复古风格
templates.prompt: vintage film portrait, {subject}, warm color tones, grain texture, 35mm film look, soft focus, nostalgic mood, {background}

templates.name: 时尚大片
templates.prompt: fashion magazine cover, {subject}, dramatic lighting, editorial makeup, high fashion, {pose}, studio backdrop, Vogue style, 85mm lens

templates.name: 黑白肖像
templates.prompt: black and white portrait photography, {subject}, high contrast monochrome, dramatic shadows, {mood}, classic portrait style, Leica M6

templates.name: 私房风格
templates.prompt: intimate portrait, {subject}, soft diffused light, warm tones, indoor setting, {pose}, cinematic composition, 50mm f/1.4

templates.name: 街拍风格
templates.prompt: street portrait, {subject}, candid moment, urban environment, natural light, {expression}, documentary style, 35mm film

templates.name: 古风人像
templates.prompt: traditional Chinese portrait, {subject}, hanfu clothing, classical garden setting, ink wash painting style, elegant pose, delicate features
